auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Axiom API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or view API tokens from Settings > API tokens in Axiom: https://app.axiom.co/

edgeDeployment.description: The edge deployment assigned to the dataset.

retentionDays.description: The number of days Axiom should retain data in the dataset.

useRetentionPeriod.description: Whether the dataset should use a retention period.

referrer.description: Optional referrer slug sent as the create dataset query parameter.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating an Axiom dataset.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating an Axiom dataset.

actions.name: delete_dataset
actions.description: Delete an Axiom dataset by ID or unique name.

dataset_id.description: The Axiom dataset ID or unique dataset name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting an Axiom dataset.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when deleting an Axiom dataset.

actions.name: get_dataset
actions.description: Get an Axiom dataset by ID or unique name.

dataset_id.description: The Axiom dataset ID or unique dataset name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting an Axiom dataset.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting an Axiom dataset.

actions.name: list_datasets
actions.description: List Axiom datasets visible to the current token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Axiom datasets.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Axiom datasets.

actions.name: run_apl_query
actions.description: Run an Axiom Processing Language query through the global API endpoint.

apl.description: The APL query string to execute.

nocache.description: Whether Axiom should bypass cached query results.

dataset_name.description: The associated dataset name when saving query results.

cursor.description: The query cursor returned by a previous Axiom query.

endTime.description: The query end time as RFC3339 or a relative time expression.

includeCursor.description: Whether the query response should include cursors.

queryOptions.description: Axiom query options passed through to the APL API.

startTime.description: The query start time as RFC3339 or a relative time expression.

variables.description: Variables inserted into the APL query.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for running an Axiom APL query.

datasetNames.description: The dataset names included in the query result.

blocksCached.description: The number of blocks served from cache.

blocksExamined.description: The number of blocks examined by the query.

blocksMatched.description: The number of blocks matched by the query.

cacheStatus.description: The Axiom cache status code for the query.

elapsedTime.description: The query elapsed time in nanoseconds.

isPartial.description: Whether Axiom returned a partial query result.

maxBlockTime.description: The latest block time scanned by the query.

maxCursor.description: The maximum cursor returned by the query.

minBlockTime.description: The earliest block time scanned by the query.

minCursor.description: The minimum cursor returned by the query.

numGroups.description: The number of groups produced by the query.

rowsExamined.description: The number of rows examined by the query.

rowsMatched.description: The number of rows matched by the query.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when running an Axiom APL query.
